Rev 14:6-7.kjv_text: And I saw another angel fly in the midst of heaven, having the everlasting gospel to preach unto them that dwell on the earth, and to every nation, and kindred, and tongue, and people, Saying with a loud voice, Fear God, and give glory to him; for the hour of his judgment is come: and worship him that made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters.

Rev 14:9-10.kjv_text: And the third angel followed them, saying with a loud voice, If any man worship the beast and his image, and receive [his] mark in his forehead, or in his hand, The same shall drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is poured out without mixture into the cup of his indignation; and he shall be tormented with fire and brimstone in the presence of the holy angels, and in the presence of the Lamb:

Rev 14:12.kjv_text: Here is the patience of the saints: here [are] they that keep the commandments of God, and the faith of Jesus.

Rev 13:4.kjv_text: And they worshipped the dragon which gave power unto the beast: and they worshipped the beast, saying, Who [is] like unto the beast? who is able to make war with him?

Rev 13:15.kjv_text: And he had power to give life unto the image of the beast, that the image of the beast should both speak, and cause that as many as would not worship the image of the beast should be killed.

1 John 4:16-17.kjv_text: And we have known and believed the love that God hath to us. God is love; and he that dwelleth in love dwelleth in God, and God in him. Herein is our love made perfect, that we may have boldness in the day of judgment: because as he is, so are we in this world.

1 John 4:18.kjv_text: There is no fear in love; but perfect love casteth out fear: because fear hath torment. He that feareth is not made perfect in love.

Eccl 12:13-14.kjv_text: Let us hear the conclusion of the whole matter: Fear God, and keep his commandments: for this [is] the whole [duty] of man. For God shall bring every work into judgment, with every secret thing, whether [it be] good, or whether [it be] evil.

Deut 10:12-13.kjv_text: And now, Israel, what doth the LORD thy God require of thee, but to fear the LORD thy God, to walk in all his ways, and to love him, and to serve the LORD thy God with all thy heart and with all thy soul, To keep the commandments of the LORD, and his statutes, which I command thee this day for thy good?

Deut 6:5.kjv_text: And thou shalt love the LORD thy God with all thine heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy might.

Deut 6:13.kjv_text: Thou shalt fear the LORD thy God, and serve him, and shalt swear by his name.

Matt 10:28.kjv_text: And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in hell.

Exod 20:18-20.kjv_text: And all the people saw the thunderings, and the lightnings, and the noise of the trumpet, and the mountain smoking: and when the people saw [it], they removed, and stood afar off. And they said unto Moses, Speak thou with us, and we will hear: but let not God speak with us, lest we die. And Moses said unto the people, Fear not: for God is come to prove you, and that his fear may be before your faces, that ye sin not.

Prov 1:7.kjv_text: The fear of the LORD [is] the beginning of knowledge: [but] fools despise wisdom and instruction.

Prov 8:13.kjv_text: The fear of the LORD [is] to hate evil: pride, and arrogancy, and the evil way, and the froward mouth, do I hate.

Prov 9:10.kjv_text: The fear of the LORD [is] the beginning of wisdom: and the knowledge of the holy [is] understanding.

Prov 14:26-27.kjv_text: In the fear of the LORD [is] strong confidence: and his children shall have a place of refuge. The fear of the LORD [is] a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.

Prov 16:6.kjv_text: By mercy and truth iniquity is purged: and by the fear of the LORD [men] depart from evil.

Isa 11:2-3.kjv_text: And the spirit of the LORD shall rest upon him, the spirit of wisdom and understanding, the spirit of counsel and might, the spirit of knowledge and of the fear of the LORD; And shall make him of quick understanding in the fear of the LORD: and he shall not judge after the sight of his eyes, neither reprove after the hearing of his ears:

Gen 22:12.kjv_text: And he said, Lay not thine hand upon the lad, neither do thou any thing unto him: for now I know that thou fearest God, seeing thou hast not withheld thy son, thine only [son] from me.

Luke 12:4-5.kjv_text: And I say unto you my friends, Be not afraid of them that kill the body, and after that have no more that they can do. But I will forewarn you whom ye shall fear: Fear him, which after he hath killed hath power to cast into hell; yea, I say unto you, Fear him.

Rom 8:15.kjv_text: For ye have not received the spirit of bondage again to fear; but ye have received the Spirit of adoption, whereby we cry, Abba, Father.

2 Tim 1:7.kjv_text: For God hath not given us the spirit of fear; but of power, and of love, and of a sound mind.

Heb 12:28-29.kjv_text: Wherefore we receiving a kingdom which cannot be moved, let us have grace, whereby we may serve God acceptably with reverence and godly fear: For our God [is] a consuming fire.

1 Pet 1:17.kjv_text: And if ye call on the Father, who without respect of persons judgeth according to every man's work, pass the time of your sojourning [here] in fear:

Acts 10:2.kjv_text: [A] devout [man], and one that feared God with all his house, which gave much alms to the people, and prayed to God alway.

Ps 130:4.kjv_text: But there is forgiveness with thee, that thou mayest be feared.

Dan 3:16-18.kjv_text: Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, answered and said to the king, O Nebuchadnezzar, we [are] not careful to answer thee in this matter. If it be [so], our God whom we serve is able to deliver us from the burning fiery furnace, and he will deliver [us] out of thine hand, O king. But if not, be it known unto thee, O king, that we will not serve thy gods, nor worship the golden image which thou hast set up.

Jonah 1:9.kjv_text: And he said unto them, I [am] an Hebrew; and I fear the LORD, the God of heaven, which hath made the sea and the dry [land].

Isa 29:13.kjv_text: Wherefore the Lord said, Forasmuch as this people draw near [me] with their mouth, and with their lips do honour me, but have removed their heart far from me, and their fear toward me is taught by the precept of men:

Matt 4:10.kjv_text: Then saith Jesus unto him, Get thee hence, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship the Lord thy God, and him only shalt thou serve.

Mal 3:16.kjv_text: Then they that feared the LORD spake often one to another: and the LORD hearkened, and heard [it], and a book of remembrance was written before him for them that feared the LORD, and that thought upon his name.

Ps 96:4-9.kjv_text: For the LORD [is] great, and greatly to be praised: he [is] to be feared above all gods. For all the gods of the nations [are] idols: but the LORD made the heavens. Honour and majesty [are] before him: strength and beauty [are] in his sanctuary. Give unto the LORD, O ye kindreds of the people, give unto the LORD glory and strength. Give unto the LORD the glory [due unto] his name: bring an offering, and come into his courts. O worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness: fear before him, all the earth.

Rev 15:4.kjv_text: Who shall not fear thee, O Lord, and glorify thy name? for [thou] only [art] holy: for all nations shall come and worship before thee; for thy judgments are made manifest.

Isa 8:13.kjv_text: Sanctify the LORD of hosts himself; and [let] him [be] your fear, and [let] him [be] your dread.

James 2:19.kjv_text: Thou believest that there is one God; thou doest well: the devils also believe, and tremble.

Phil 2:12.kjv_text: Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.

2 Cor 5:10-11.kjv_text: For we must all appear before the judgment seat of Christ; that every one may receive the things [done] in [his] body, according to that he hath done, whether [it be] good or bad. Knowing therefore the terror of the Lord, we persuade men; but we are made manifest unto God; and I trust also are made manifest in your consciences.

Heb 5:7.kjv_text: Who in the days of his flesh, when he had offered up prayers and supplications with strong crying and tears unto him that was able to save him from death, and was heard in that he feared;

Heb 11:7.kjv_text: By faith Noah, being warned of God of things not seen as yet, moved with fear, prepared an ark to the saving of his house; by the which he condemned the world, and became heir of the righteousness which is by faith.

1 John 5:3.kjv_text: For this is the love of God, that we keep his commandments: and his commandments are not grievous.

Lev 19:3.kjv_text: Ye shall fear every man his mother, and his father, and keep my sabbaths: I [am] the LORD your God.

Rev 21:8.kjv_text: But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.

Rev 14:7.kjv_text: Saying with a loud voice, Fear God, and give glory to him; for the hour of his judgment is come: and worship him that made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters.

Acts 10:35.kjv_text: But in every nation he that feareth him, and worketh righteousness, is accepted with him.

Ps 111:10.kjv_text: The fear of the LORD [is] the beginning of wisdom: a good understanding have all they that do [his commandments]: his praise endureth for ever.

Ps 34:9-11.kjv_text: O fear the LORD, ye his saints: for [there is] no want to them that fear him. The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger: but they that seek the LORD shall not want any good [thing]. Come, ye children, hearken unto me: I will teach you the fear of the LORD.

Deut 5:29.kjv_text: O that there were such an heart in them, that they would fear me, and keep all my commandments always, that it might be well with them, and with their children for ever!

Mal 1:6.kjv_text: A son honoureth [his] father, and a servant his master: if then I [be] a father, where [is] mine honour? and if I [be] a master, where [is] my fear? saith the LORD of hosts unto you, O priests, that despise my name. And ye say, Wherein have we despised thy name?

Lev 19:14.kjv_text: Thou shalt not curse the deaf, nor put a stumblingblock before the blind, but shalt fear thy God: I [am] the LORD.

Lev 25:17.kjv_text: Ye shall not therefore oppress one another; but thou shalt fear thy God: for I [am] the LORD your God.

Neh 5:15.kjv_text: But the former governors that [had been] before me were chargeable unto the people, and had taken of them bread and wine, beside forty shekels of silver; yea, even their servants bare rule over the people: but so did not I, because of the fear of God.

Job 28:28.kjv_text: And unto man he said, Behold, the fear of the Lord, that [is] wisdom; and to depart from evil [is] understanding.

Matt 25:46.kjv_text: And these shall go away into everlasting punishment: but the righteous into life eternal.

Eccl 3:14.kjv_text: I know that, whatsoever God doeth, it shall be for ever: nothing can be put to it, nor any thing taken from it: and God doeth [it], that [men] should fear before him.

Eccl 8:12-13.kjv_text: Though a sinner do evil an hundred times, and his [days] be prolonged, yet surely I know that it shall be well with them that fear God, which fear before him: But it shall not be well with the wicked, neither shall he prolong [his] days, [which are] as a shadow; because he feareth not before God.

2 Cor 7:1.kjv_text: Having therefore these promises, dearly beloved, let us cleanse ourselves from all filthiness of the flesh and spirit, perfecting holiness in the fear of God.

Rev 11:18.kjv_text: And the nations were angry, and thy wrath is come, and the time of the dead, that they should be judged, and that thou shouldest give reward unto thy servants the prophets, and to the saints, and them that fear thy name, small and great; and shouldest destroy them which destroy the earth.

Rev 19:5.kjv_text: And a voice came out of the throne, saying, Praise our God, all ye his servants, and ye that fear him, both small and great.

Ps 2:11.kjv_text: Serve the LORD with fear, and rejoice with trembling.

parsing.Eccl 12:13:

ve'attah (Adv 'and now'), yisra'el (PropN 'Israel'), mah (IntPron 'what'), YHWH (H3068 PropN), elohekha (H430 Noun.mp+2ms 'your God'), sho'el (H7592 Verb.Qal.Ptcp 'asks'), me'immakh (H5973 Prep+2ms 'from with you'), ki im (H3588+H518 'but'), leyir'ah (H3372 Verb.Qal.InfCon 'to fear'), et (H853 Prep), YHWH (H3068), elohekha (H430+2ms), lalekhet (H1980 Verb.Qal.InfCon 'to walk'), bekhol (H3605 'in all'), derakhav (H1870 Noun.mp+3ms 'his ways'), ule'ahabah (H157 Verb.Qal.InfCon 'and to love'), oto (H853+3ms 'him'), vela'abod (H5647 Verb.Qal.InfCon 'and to serve'), et (H853), YHWH (H3068), elohekha (H430+2ms), bekhol (H3605 'with all'), levavekha (H3824 Noun.ms+2ms 'your heart'), uvkhol (H3605 'and with all'), nafshekha (H5315 Noun.fs+2ms 'your soul')
parsing.Exod 20:18:
vekhol-ha'am ro'im et-haqqolot ve'et-hallappidim ve'et qol hashshophar ve'et-hahar ashen vayyar' ha'am vayyanu'u vayya'amdu merachoq

ro'im (H7200 Verb.Qal.Ptcp.mp 'seeing'), vayyar' (H7200 Verb.Qal.Wayq.3ms 'and they saw' — NOTE: this is ra'ah H7200 'to see', NOT yare H3372 'to fear'), vayyanu'u (H5128 Verb.Qal.Wayq.3mp 'and they trembled'), vayya'amdu (H5975 Verb.Qal.Wayq.3mp 'and they stood'), merachoq (H7350 Adj.ms 'afar off')
parsing.Exod 20:20:
vayyomer mosheh el-ha'am al-tira'u ki leva'avur nassot etkkhem ba ha'elohim uva'avur tihyeh yir'ato al-penekhem levilti techeta'u

al-tira'u (al H408 Neg + H3372 Verb.Qal.Impf.2mp 'do not fear' — IMMEDIATE PROHIBITION), nassot (H5254 Verb.Piel.InfCon 'to test'), yir'ato (H3374 Noun.fs+3ms 'his fear'), al-penekhem (H6440 Noun.mp+2mp 'upon your faces'), levilti (H1115 Noun.ms.Cst 'so as not to'), techeta'u (H2398 Verb.Qal.Impf.2mp 'sin')
parsing.Ps 130:4:
ki-immekha hasselichah lema'an tivvare

ki (H3588 Conj 'for'), immekha (H5973 Prep+2ms 'with you'), hasselichah (H5547 Noun.fs.Abs 'the forgiveness'), lema'an (H4616 Prep 'so that/in order that' — PURPOSE), tivvare (H3372 Verb.Niphal.Impf.2ms 'you may be feared')
